name: Toshi Moto
description: Secure Bitcoin portfolio monitoring with privacy-first design
compose:
name: slashnode-toshi-moto
services:
  api_web:
    image: toshimoto821/toshi-moto-api:1.8.4
    container_name: toshi-moto-api_web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - mongodb
    environment:
      PORT: '8121'
      MONGODB_URI: mongodb://toshi-moto-mongodb:27017/toshi-moto
  web:
    image: toshimoto821/toshi-moto:1.37.3
    container_name: toshi-moto-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - api_web
    environment:
      PORT: '8021'
    volumes:
      - web_data-proxy-nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8021:8021
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:8.0.10
    container_name: toshi-moto-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: mongod --noauth
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data-db:/data/db
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-proxy-nginx.conf:
    name: slashnode-toshi-moto_web_data-proxy-nginx.conf
  mongodb_data-db:
    name: slashnode-toshi-moto_mongodb_data-db
